name: Patient 32
history: Strained relationships with parents, feeling judged/disapproved. Mother's health condition mentioned. Issues with parental support during education. Mother described as "broken" with affair allegations.
intermediate_belief: No achievement will ever be enough for my parents.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm chasing approval from people who can't give it.
coping_strategies: Overachieving, emotional detachment, seeking external validation.
situation: Received work bonus for exceptional performance. During call with parents, they asked about job prospects.
auto_thought: "The bonus doesn't matter; they just want to know about my next move. Nothing is ever enough."
behavior: Minimizes bonus achievement, changes subject to mother's health, ends call quickly.
